name: tab-mirror-extension
description: Firefox extension for mirroring tabs across multiple instances

scripts.test:basic: npm run build:test && node tests/run-with-server.js tests/integration/basic-sync.test.js
scripts.test:ops: npm run build:test && node tests/run-with-server.js tests/integration/tab-operations.test.js
scripts.test:window: npm run build:test && node tests/run-with-server.js tests/integration/sync-window.test.js
scripts.test:multi: npm run build:test && node tests/run-with-server.js tests/integration/multi-instance.test.js
scripts.test:stress: npm run build:test && node tests/run-with-server.js tests/integration/stress.test.js
scripts.test:stale: npm run build:test && node tests/run-with-server.js tests/integration/stale-peer.test.js
scripts.test:edge: npm run build:test && node tests/run-with-server.js tests/integration/edge-cases.test.js
scripts.test:validation: npm run build:test && node tests/run-with-server.js tests/integration/validation.test.js
scripts.test:connectivity: npm run build:test && node tests/run-with-server.js tests/integration/connectivity.test.js
scripts.test:broadcast: npm run build:test && node tests/run-with-server.js tests/integration/broadcast-retry.test.js
scripts.test:encryption: npm run build:test && node tests/run-with-server.js tests/integration/encryption.test.js
scripts.test:concurrent: npm run build:test && node tests/run-with-server.js tests/integration/concurrent-sync.test.js
scripts.test:blank: npm run build:test && node tests/run-with-server.js tests/integration/blank-tab-merge.test.js
scripts.test:popup: npm run build:test && node tests/run-with-server.js tests/integration/popup-ui.test.js
